Description: Suffix appended to the report filename. Required when configuring multiple instances of this report to prevent them from overwriting each other.
The day of the simulation to start collecting data.
The day of the simulation to stop collecting data.
The number of time steps between data collection periods. Increasing this value reduces output file size.
If set to true (1), a column is added to the report with the count of infected hepatocytes for the infection.
If set to true (1), a column is added to the report with the number of infected red blood cells (IRBCs) for the infection.
If set to true (1), a column is added to the report with the total number of mature gametocytes (male and female combined) for the infection.

Minimum hepatocyte count an infection must have for its row to be written. Only applies when **Include_Column_Hepatocyte** is true. A value of 0 disables this threshold. If this threshold is not met, the entire row is omitted even if other thresholds are met.

Minimum IRBC count an infection must have for its row to be written. Only applies when **Include_Column_IRBC** is true. A value of 0 disables this threshold. If this threshold is not met, the entire row is omitted even if other thresholds are met.

Minimum gametocyte count an infection must have for its row to be written. Only applies when **Include_Column_Gametocyte** is true. A value of 0 disables this threshold. If this threshold is not met, the entire row is omitted even if other thresholds are met.
